minimum_level.note: At absolute minimum a record must have a title

core_level.note: Core cataloging: control number, title, fixed field

full_level.note: Full-level cataloging required for original records

022.note: ISSN: four digits, hyphen, four digits (last may be X)

010.note: LCCN: normalize leading spaces and trailing check

encoding.normalization: NFC normalization required for all string data
encoding.marc8_detection: Flag records where Leader/09 is blank but data contains non-ASCII
